description:
🛒 SHOP OUR EBAY STORE → https://www.ebay.com/str/shedflipsstore

🔗 ALL OUR LINKS → https://linktr.ee/shedflips

Hey y'all! Mid-week packing day with Lonnie and Candice — sales have been steady, the packs are all easy ones today, and we got into A LOT of side conversations along the way. We talk through the brand-new Lonnie & Ryan Podcast episode with John from Popeye's Postcards (the man literally flew across the country to buy ONE MILLION postcards 🤯), tease an upcoming guest we are hyped about — Tesla Picker is BACK — and finally dig into whether we should give live selling a try on Whatnot or Poshmark. Plus eBay's new AI-image live-show ads, the Ewan McGregor "Long Way" Netflix series, Air Force vs Army stories, and the $1 Urban Decay eyeliner buy that just keeps paying off.

In today's packing:
🥾 Lucchese boot shaft covers — a $125+ 5-pair bundle
🎩 Pink Floyd baseball hat (paid $4, sold fast)
💄 Urban Decay 24/7 eye pencils — the $1 sourcing win
🎶 Cody Jinks "Wanting After The Fire" 3 LP vinyl
🛳 Carnival Cruise Line coral reef porthole picture frame
🧸 Pop Mart "We Are Twinkle Twinkle Little Superman" pendant
🏍 Harley-Davidson rain suit
👖 Long Haul jeans, Steve Madden Kronos loafers, and a few more easy ones

CHAPTERS
0:00  Welcome — easy packing day
1:42  New Lonnie & Ryan Podcast: John from Popeye's Postcards (1 MILLION postcards)
3:11  Combined order — saving the customer $4
5:45  Ewan McGregor's "Long Way" Netflix series
8:26  Polybagging US Army sweatpants + Air Force vs Army stories
12:05 eBay's obnoxious AI live-show ads
12:54 Cody Jinks 3 LP vinyl in a vinyl mailer
14:25 Should we try Whatnot or Poshmark live selling?
20:49 Tesla Picker is BACK — upcoming podcast tease
22:58 Harley-Davidson rain suit
24:02 Pop Mart Twinkle Twinkle Little Superman
24:55 Pop Mart trend + Labubu movie incoming
25:34 Carnival Cruise porthole frame in the new 14x14x10 Zoro box
31:08 More Urban Decay — the $1 eyeliner buy
35:36 Pink Floyd hat we paid $4 for
36:30 5-pair Lucchese boot shaft cover bundle ($125+)
38:00 Last pack — single Lucchese order
38:41 Wrap up

🎙 LONNIE & RYAN PODCAST → https://www.youtube.com/@LonnieandRyan
📦 SHED FLIPS (sourcing channel) → https://www.youtube.com/@shedflips
🔧 GARAGE GEEK GUY → https://www.youtube.com/@garagegeekguy

Thanks so much for joining us today, y'all! See you again very soon. Bye y'all!

#packwithus #imgonnapackit #ebayreseller #ebaypacking #shedflips #resellerlife
